title: Entangled
description: Entangled allows you to 'entangle' two blocks together!
body:
![Entangled](https://imgur.com/BgyAG6g.png) **Entangled** gives you the materials needed to bind two blocks together, allowing you to interact with either one as if they were the same block! This will allow you to transfer items, energy, fluids or whatever you want instantly, you can have more than six sides to work with or you could just hide your messy cables, the possibilities are endless! ![Separator](https://imgur.com/clwOKBG.png) #### Entangled Block - This block will absorb the state of another!
Recipe
#### Entangled Binder - Allows you to control what blocks bind together!
Recipe
![Separator](https://imgur.com/clwOKBG.png) ### Step-by-step Guide #### Binding the Entangled Block 1. Craft an Entangled Block and an Entangled Binder 2. Place down your Entangled Block 3. Right-Click on the block you want to bind with the Entangled Binder 4. Right-Click on your Entangled Block with the Entangled Binder #### Unbinding the Entangled Block 1. Select an empty slot on your hotbar 2. Start crouching 3. Right-Click on the Entangled Block ![Separator](https://imgur.com/clwOKBG.png) ### Configuration **Config options** - `allowDimensional`: true or false, true by default Determines whether entangled blocks can be bound between different dimensions. - `maxDistance`: -1 or a number greater than 0, -1 by default Determines the maximum distance between an entangled and its target. -1 means no limit. - `renderBlockHighlight`: true or false, true by default A client-side option to determine whether when looking at an entangled block, its targeted block is highlighted. - `rotateRenderedBlock`: true or false, true by default A client-side option to determine whether the block rendered inside an entangled block spins around. **Tags** - `entangled:invalid_targets` block tag The entangled block cannot target any blocks inside the tag. - `entangled:render_blacklist` block tag Any blocks in the tag will not be rendered inside entangled blocks. - `entangled:render_blacklist` block entity type tag The entangled block won't render any block entity for which their type is in the tag. ![Separator](https://imgur.com/clwOKBG.png) ### FAQ **Does the Entangled Block work interdimensionally?** Yes, just select a block in a different dimension with the Entangled Binder **Can I use your mod in my modpack?** Yes, feel free to use my mod in your modpack ![Separator](https://imgur.com/clwOKBG.png) ### Discord For future content, upcoming mods, and discussion, feel free to join the SuperMartijn642 discord server! [](https://discord.gg/QEbGyUYB2e) ![Separator](https://imgur.com/clwOKBG.png)
